title: Anthropic's Claude Tag: 60% Interact This Way! #shorts
summary: A YouTube short about Claude Tag, Anthropic's internal tool that reportedly accounts for 60% of interaction patterns. The video explains how Claude Tag functions within Anthropic's operations.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof covers Claude Tag, an internal Anthropic tool that the video reports accounts for 60% of interaction patterns. It explains how Claude Tag operates within Anthropic's day-to-day workflows, touching on prompt use and developer tooling. The takeaway is a look at how an internal utility shapes a large share of how interactions happen inside the company.
